# infra corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === HashiCorp Vault ===
# expect: HashiCorp Vault Service Token
hvs.CAESIExampleExampleExampleExampleExampleABCD

# expect: HashiCorp Vault Batch Token
hvb.AAAAAQIExampleExampleExampleExampleExampleAB

# expect: HashiCorp Vault Recovery Token
hvr.AAAAExampleExampleExampleExampleExampleABCD

# expect: HashiCorp Vault Transit Ciphertext
vault:v1:abcdABCD1234567890efghEXAMPLEEXAMPLE==

# === Terraform / Pulumi ===
# expect: HashiCorp Terraform Cloud Token
abcdEFGH123456.atlasv1.aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa

# expect: Pulumi Access Token
pul-0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef01234567

# === Ansible ===
# expect: Ansible Vault Encrypted Blob
$ANSIBLE_VAULT;1.1;AES256
31326566313233346162636465663132

# === Doppler ===
# expect: Doppler Service Token
dp.pt.abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEF

# expect: Doppler CLI Token
dp.ct.abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEF

# expect: Doppler Service Account Token
dp.sa.abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEF

# expect: Doppler Personal Token
dp.pa.abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEF

# === Docker ===
# expect: Docker Hub Personal Access Token
dckr_pat_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# === Proxmox ===
# expect: Proxmox API Token
root@pam!mytoken=00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000

# === SettleMint ===
# expect: SettleMint Personal Access Token
sm_pat_abcdef0123456789ABCDEF

# expect: SettleMint Application Access Token
sm_aat_abcdef0123456789ABCDEF

# expect: SettleMint Service Access Token
sm_sat_abcdef0123456789ABCDEF

# === Infisical / Akeyless ===
# expect: Infisical Service Token
st.abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOP.qrst

# expect: Akeyless Token
t-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEF

# === 1Password ===
# expect: 1Password Secret Key
A3-ABCDEF-GHIJKL-MNOPQ-RSTUV-WXYZA-BCDEF

# expect: 1Password Service Account Token
ops_abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789ABCDEF

# === age ===
# expect: Age Secret Key
AGE-SECRET-KEY-1GFPYYSJZGFPYYSJZGFPYYSJZGFPYYSJZGFPYYSJZGFPYYSJZGFPYYSJZGF

# === Doppler / Bitwarden SM / Keeper (Block 3a) ===
# expect: Doppler SCIM/Audit/Service-Account Token
# expect: Bitwarden Secrets Manager Machine Token
# expect: Keeper KSM One-Time Token
dp.audit.aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
0.12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789abc.AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA:QUJDREVGQUJDREVGQUJDREVGQUJDREVG
US:AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
